10 (French-based) Fitness Influencers To Follow on Instagram In 2024

Do you operate in the fitness, exercise, wellness, and/or sports industry? Are you struggling to find the best fit influencers for your brand?

With Click Analytic you can access up to 145M influencers’ analytics in just a few clicks.

We listed the best fitness influencers on Instagram to monitor in 2024. Looking for more? Create an account for FREE

#01

@tiboinshape

Tiboinshape

4.99M
Followers

1.57%
Eng. Rate

Average
Audience Overall Quality
Analyse for FREE

Influencer and bodybuilding enthusiast, Tibo Inshape provides entertainment, exercises and motivation to his 5 million followers.  His videos are often comedy sketches which make sure that fitness stays fun.  Over 72% of his audience is French, a very strong country presence for potential French brand partners.

#02

@jujufitcats

Juju Fitcats

3.17M
Followers

3.77%
Eng. Rate

Good
Audience Overall Quality

Analyse for FREE

From weightlifting to reggaeton dancing, Juju Fitcats demonstrates that there is no single way to get fit, and that it can be fun in the meantime.  This relatable influencer also posts photos from her everyday life and body acceptance posts, showing that fitness can be about self-kindness and life-balance.  89.08% of her audience has French as a main language, which will help to spark engagement.

#03

@sissymua

Sissy

1.53M
Followers

1.3%
Eng. Rate

Average
Audience Overall Quality
Analyse for FREE

Co-founder of TSE (Train Sweat Eat), Sissy promotes cardio training and healthy, balanced eating.  On her Instagram feed she shares offers to her exercise program, alongside achievable recipes, for well-rounded health and fitness. 80% of her audience speaks French, leading to higher engagement. 

#04

@majormouvement

Major Mouvement

503.61K
Followers

2.19%
Eng. Rate

Good
Audience Overall Quality

Analyse for FREE

Major Mouvement provides helpful information and tips on how to care for your body, from solutions to knee pain, to what type of abs you might want (and how to get them), all shared via amusing and likeable videos.  At over 87%, he has a high Audience Authenticity Score.

#05

@marinlle

Marine LELEU

464.64K
Followers

1.5%
Eng. Rate

Average
Audience Overall Quality
Analyse for FREE

She swims, rides and runs for fun – and she’s good at it, being the first French woman to finish the Enduroman, an intense race involving swimming, cycling and running. Our Click Tool also has identified her as a “Super Influencer”, which can help her content to reach targeted audiences.

#06

@fitbyclem

Clem | COACH SPORTIVE 🔥🇫🇷

301.65K
Followers

3.41%
Eng. Rate

Average
Audience Overall Quality
Analyse for FREE

As a fitness and bodybuilding expert, Clem shares wisdom on workout tips and techniques, including exercise dos and don’ts throughout pregnancy.  Also providing advice on how best to warm up before exercising, Clem makes sure to put safety first.  As a “Super Influencer”, Clem’s posts can generate a lot of impressions.  

#07

@fitclaire

fit-CLAIRE 🔹

176.97K
Followers

0.43%
Eng. Rate

Good
Audience Overall Quality

Analyse for FREE

A travelling enthusiast who always finds time for fitness (and a deliciously balanced diet!), fit-CLAIRE showcases hiit sessions, cardio workouts and muscle strengthening for well-rounded fitness.  Working with brands including Oysho, Women’s Best, and La Place Fitness, fit-CLAIRE helps followers to attain those healthy lifestyle goals.

#08

@karoline.ro

Karoline

167.89K
Followers

2.32%
Eng. Rate

Average
Audience Overall Quality
Analyse for FREE

Posting videos on her ‘Belly Sculpt Challenge’ and ‘The four rules to follow for fat loss’, Karoline provides followers with practical ways to achieve their fitness aims. With a Click-analyzed “Good” engagement rate, her content is sure to interest her audience.

#09

@dorian_kohlanta

Dorian Louvet

132.54K
Followers

2.19%
Eng. Rate

Good
Audience Overall Quality

Analyse for FREE

Athlete and running coach Dorian Louvet shares aspirational footage of trail runs and races from around the world.  He also cycles, showing that there is no one way to enjoy exercise and fitness.  With over 93% of his audience having French as a main language, this amazing score identified by our Click Tool will be sure to spark engagement. 

#10

@juliepujols

Julie PB

75.59K
Followers

3.36%
Eng. Rate

Good
Audience Overall Quality

Analyse for FREE

A fitness trainer and certified coach, Julie PB shares accessible exercises that can be done anywhere, from by the side of a pool to on a chair.  Her audience authenticity score is strong, at an impressive 85.33%.
